summary: Iteration 62: CRITICAL SYSTEM UPGRADE validation COMPLETE. All 28 backend tests passed. Verified: (1) Capital allocation with max_total_exposure=360, per-strategy caps=120 each, arb_reserved_capital=120. (2) Arb max_stale_age_seconds=300. (3) Weather asymmetric min_model_prob=0.20. (4) Weather lifecycle_mode=shadow_exit with market_collapse_threshold=0.05. (5) upgrade-validation endpoint returns comprehensive system health data. (6) PnL attribution uses original strategy, not 'resolver'.

minor.issue: weather_lifecycle.mode returns metrics-level mode (tag_only) instead of config-level mode (shadow_exit). This is because the metrics dict tracks what was last processed, not what is configured. The authoritative config at /api/positions/weather/lifecycle correctly shows mode=shadow_exit.

controls_endpoint: exposure_by_strategy has weather, crypto, arb - PASS
exposure_caps has crypto=120, weather=120, arb=120, arb_reserved=120, total=360 - PASS
upgrade_validation_endpoint: weather_lifecycle has mode, positions_evaluated, exit_candidates, shadow_exits_total - PASS
resolver_stats has zombies_force_resolved, total_resolved, recent_resolutions - PASS
config_endpoint: risk has crypto_max_exposure=120, weather_max_exposure=120, arb_max_exposure=120, arb_reserved_capital=120, max_market_exposure=360 - PASS

zombie_resolution.description: Market resolver tracks zombies_force_resolved with type='zombie_force_resolve' in recent_resolutions
zombie_resolution.evidence: resolver_stats.zombies_force_resolved field present in both /api/admin/upgrade-validation and /api/diagnostics

pnl_attribution.description: PnL attributed to originating strategy, not 'resolver'
pnl_attribution.evidence: No 'resolver' key in pnl_by_strategy or trade_counts_by_strategy

upgrade_validation_endpoint.description: New /api/admin/upgrade-validation endpoint returns comprehensive system health
upgrade_validation_endpoint.evidence: Returns capital_allocation, current_exposure, weather_lifecycle, shadow_exit_counts_by_reason, arb_health, crypto_health, resolver_stats

critical_code_review_comments: RiskConfig in models.py correctly has crypto_max_exposure, weather_max_exposure, arb_max_exposure, arb_reserved_capital fields
risk.py check_order() has per-strategy exposure checks and arb reserved capital logic
weather_models.py has ExitReason.MARKET_COLLAPSE, market_collapse_threshold=0.05, lifecycle_mode='shadow_exit', asymmetric_min_model_prob=0.20
market_resolver_service.py has zombie force-resolution logic with 6-hour grace period
server.py has /api/admin/upgrade-validation endpoint and startup migration that applies upgrade values
seed_data_creation: None - tested with live MongoDB data (65 positions: 34 weather, 11 crypto, 20 arb)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 62 verified the CRITICAL SYSTEM UPGRADE. Key findings: (1) Capital allocation correctly set: max_total=360, per-strategy=120, arb_reserved=120. (2) Per-strategy exposure checked in risk.py check_order(). (3) Arb max_stale_age=300s. (4) Weather asymmetric min_model_prob=0.20. (5) Weather lifecycle in shadow_exit mode with market_collapse_threshold=0.05. (6) Zombie resolver tracks force_resolutions separately. (7) PnL attributed to originating strategy. Minor note: /api/admin/upgrade-validation weather_lifecycle.mode returns metrics-level mode (tag_only) instead of config-level mode (shadow_exit) - this is because metrics track what was processed, not what is configured. The authoritative config at /api/positions/weather/lifecycle correctly shows shadow_exit.
